stories.headline: UK police accused of double standard in handling stabbing death of 18-year-old Henry Nowak

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 UPDATE: Elon Musk is going BALLISTIC on the double standard of UK police allowing 18-year-old white male Nick Nowak to be KILLED by a perpetrator who cried "he was being racist," instead of going after the killer

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: There were massive international protests over George Floyd and those police involved were severely punished with long prison sentences, yet the police responsible here did not even lose their jobs! An incredibly unjust double-standard!

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: An 18-year-old kid gets stabbed in the street. He’s running for his life, begging for help, and instead of saving him, the police handcuff him while he bleeds out because the attacker claimed “racism.”

stories.headline: UK loosens Russian oil sanctions amid rising fuel prices

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 1,000 jobs are lost in our North Sea oil and gas sector every month, as a direct result of Labour's ban on new drilling licences.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: The Russians intercepted an RAF spy plane 20 miles from Russia and 2000 miles from the UK. UK accuses Russia of aggression.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: If the Russian military had attacked civilian boats in intl waters & seized more than 400 people on board (including UK citizens) & then forcibly taken them to Russia, does anyone think the UK media would be describing what Russia had done as arresting them?

stories.headline: Rep. Nancy Mace proposes constitutional amendment requiring natural-born citizenship for Congress, judges, and federal officers

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Ilhan Omar. Shri Thanedar. Pramila Jayapal. All born in foreign countries, none were citizens by birth. All sitting in the United States Congress. All making clear every single day their loyalty is not to America. We just introduced a long overdue joint resolution proposing a constitutional amendment to require Members of Congress, federal judges, and Senate-confirmed officers to be natural born citizens.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Absolutely. This quite obviously should be the law. We already require the president to be a natural born citizen. Why wouldn't we extend that requirement to congress and the judicial branch?

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Nancy Mace files legislation to ban foreign-born elected officials and judges.

stories.headline: Explanation of why some X posts get millions of views due to algorithm factors
stories.body: The views can be that crazy usually because the X algorithm is pushing hard to For You many people. The main factors: • The content is very shocking / emotional (😱😱😱 + pictures/videos that make people immediately stop scrolling) • Timing fit (posted when a lot of people are online) • Early engagements are fast (like, reply, repost go up fast → algo is getting push more) • Many people quote or reply because they are curious/surprised, this makes a snowball effect • The topic is relatable or makes people want to share it with friends (FOMO) The point is: content that makes people stop + emotional reaction + like algo = views explode. Not only followers, but reach millions of random accounts.

stories.headline: Democrats' draft autopsy blames Biden operation for Kamala Harris's 2024 defeat.
stories.body: Breaking News: Democrats released a draft autopsy on Kamala Harris’s defeat in the 2024 election that partly blames Joe Biden’s political operation, and arguing that it failed to position her for success in the race after he dropped out.

stories.headline: Kewpie shares no-fry cheese katsu recipe with step-by-step instructions.
stories.body:
Xで保存数6,000超えの揚げないチーズカツレシピをご紹介🍳

【作り方】(1人分)
フライパンに豚ロース肉薄切り(6枚)を2枚ずつ重ねて3組並べ、片面にマヨネーズ(大さじ1)をぬる。パン粉をふり、ひっくり返したら、もう片面にスライスチーズ(3枚)をのせて半分に折る。油(大さじ3)を回しかけ、両面がこんがりするまで揚げ焼きして完成。

stories.headline: Indictment of Castro signals Trump purging Deep State influence from Cuba and global networks.
stories.body: Why is the indictment of Castro such a big deal? Because it signals that Trump is removing Deep State influence over Cuba. Trump is undoing the damage the CIA has done over the decades, and fixing destabilized nations. It also signals Russia and China’s influence is being removed from Cuba, and the Western Hemisphere as a whole. I don’t think it’s a coincidence that as soon as Trump returns from his visit with Xi, we are now seeing movement on Cuba, while Trump is also seemingly backing off on Taiwan. This fits into my overall thesis that Trump, Xi, and Putin, have agreed to consolidate spheres of influence and stay out of each other’s yards. In order to make this happen, all nations with Deep State influence must be purged, and Cuba has been a CIA hotbed since 1959. The “Deep State” is not just corrupt US politicians, it’s a global terrorist organization that has embedded itself and overtaken nations around the world, Cuba being one of the most notable. The entire global network is being cleaned up.
